entity.label: Michaiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of those sent out by Jehoshaphat to instruct the people in the law (2 Chr. 17:7).

nodes.label: Michaiah
nodes.description: One of those sent out by Jehoshaphat to instruct the people in the law (2 Chr. 17:7).

verses.text: Also in the third year of his reign he sent to his princes, even to Benhail, and to Obadiah, and to Zechariah, and to Nethaneel, and to Michaiah, to teach in the cities of Judah.
